## DomainProcessorBase\<TState\> Class

Abstract base class for domain processors that provides typed state casting\.
Safely converts the untyped `object?` state to [TState](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Handlers.DomainProcessorBase_TState_.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Handlers.DomainProcessorBase_TState_.TState 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Handlers\.DomainProcessorBase\<TState\>\.TState')
and delegates to the typed [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Handlers\.DomainProcessorBase&lt;&gt;\.HandleAsync\(Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandEnvelope,@0\)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.client.handlers.domainprocessorbase-1.handleasync#hexalith-eventstore-client-handlers-domainprocessorbase-1-handleasync(hexalith-eventstore-contracts-commands-commandenvelope--0) 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Handlers\.DomainProcessorBase\`1\.HandleAsync\(Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandEnvelope,\`0\)') method\.
When state arrives as a [System\.Text\.Json\.JsonElement](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.text.json.jsonelement 'System\.Text\.Json\.JsonElement') \(e\.g\., from JSON deserialization
of `object?` via DAPR service invocation\), it is automatically deserialized
to [TState](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Handlers.DomainProcessorBase_TState_.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Handlers.DomainProcessorBase_TState_.TState 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Handlers\.DomainProcessorBase\<TState\>\.TState')\.

```csharp

    where TState : class
```
